Package com.nib.supernaut.terminal.jsonterminal

Class JsonTerminalFunctionHandler

java.lang.Object
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.AbstractFunctionHandler
com.nib.supernaut.terminal.jsonterminal.JsonTerminalFunctionHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
ITerminalHandler<WriteOrder>
public class JsonTerminalFunctionHandler extends AbstractFunctionHandler implements ITerminalHandler<WriteOrder>
